title: Minecraft: Askew | Just The Sounds!
description: if its a sound that you like!!! no its not anymore :D!!!
body:
Whao!!



Minecraft: Askew is a HUGE pack with so much content to offer!

**_This is ALSO not that :D!!!_**



This is just the sounds!! (Notably _**not**_ the music!!!!), so you can play vanilla but still get scared!!! aaaaahhh!!!!!!!!


Features:

-Mob Sound Overhaul

-Block Sound Overhaul

-Item Sound Overhaul

-GUI Sound Overhaul

-Cave Sounds!!

-Noteblock Sounds!!!

-If its a sound that you like!!! no its not anymore :D!!!

[Check out the Full Pack Here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-askew)

No Optifine or Mipmap Altering needed! Will work with all current versions of Minecraft :)!!

I’ve made a convenient visual album of the music available on YouTube here:

Minecraft: Askew FULL ALBUM [​Seamless + Gameplay]

PLEASE!! I don’t want to sound like a beggar! But I worked so hard on this pack, and it would mean the world if you could spare a couple bucks,
thanks boss :)!

[Support Minecraft: Askew on Ko-Fi!](https://ko-fi.com/pikes)

Album available on:


Spotify

Apple Music

Soundcloud

Bandcamp


And pretty much everywhere else you get music!:)!!



[Music Pack Available Here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-askew-just-the-music)
